entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: The crop Eleusine coracana (L.) Gaertn being studied for genetic diversity.

entities.name: GERMPLASM POOL
entities.description: The total genetic resources of finger millet, noted as largely uncharacterised.

entities.name: BENEFICIAL TRAITS
entities.description: Desirable characteristics sought within the germplasm for crop improvement.

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Programs that utilize genetically diverse germplasm with beneficial traits.

entities.name: COMPOSITE COLLECTION
entities.description: A collection of 1000 finger millet accessions developed for profiling.

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A subset of 622 accessions within the composite collection.

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of molecular profiling to characterize the germplasm.

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeats used as molecular markers for profiling.

entities.name: ABI3700
entities.description: The high throughput assay system used for genotyping.
